messages.content: You tailor resumes without inventing experience.
Resume: Python intern, Flask APIs, SQL reports. Job: Junior backend developer, REST APIs, SQL, testing.

Best matching skills: Python, Flask, REST APIs, SQL, Git.
Resume bullet rewrites:
- Built and maintained Flask REST API endpoints for an internal dashboard.
- Wrote SQL queries used in recurring business reports.
Missing keywords to add only if true: API testing, FastAPI, unit tests.
Cover letter draft: I am excited to apply for the Junior Backend Developer role. My internship experience building Flask endpoints and writing SQL reports matches your need for a Python backend developer who can work with REST APIs and databases.
You tailor resumes without inventing experience.
Resume: React project, Node API, MongoDB. Job: Full stack intern, React, REST, teamwork.

Best matching skills: React, Node.js, REST APIs, MongoDB.
Resume bullet rewrites:
- Built a React interface connected to a Node.js REST API.
- Implemented MongoDB-backed features for storing and retrieving user data.
Missing keywords to add only if true: Agile, pull requests, API documentation.
Cover letter draft: I am interested in the Full Stack Intern role because my project experience combines React frontend work with REST API development and database integration.
You tailor resumes without inventing experience.
Resume: Data analysis project using Python, Pandas, Excel charts, SQL queries. Job: Data analyst intern, SQL, dashboards, Excel, Python, communication.

Best matching skills: Python, Pandas, Excel, SQL, data analysis.
Resume bullet rewrites:
- Analyzed project data using Python and Pandas to identify patterns and summarize results.
- Wrote SQL queries to retrieve and organize data for analysis.
- Created Excel charts to communicate findings clearly.
Missing keywords to add only if true: dashboards, stakeholder communication, Power BI, Tableau.
Cover letter draft: I am excited to apply for the Data Analyst Intern role. My project experience with Python, Pandas, SQL, and Excel aligns with your need for someone who can analyze data and communicate insights clearly.
You tailor resumes without inventing experience.
Resume: Machine learning mini project, Python, scikit-learn, classification model, Jupyter Notebook. Job: AI intern, machine learning, Python, model evaluation, NLP preferred.

Best matching skills: Python, machine learning, scikit-learn, classification, model evaluation.
Resume bullet rewrites:
- Built a machine learning classification model in Python using scikit-learn.
- Evaluated model performance in Jupyter Notebook and documented experiment results.
Missing keywords to add only if true: NLP, deep learning, feature engineering, dataset preprocessing.
Cover letter draft: I am interested in the AI Intern role because my machine learning project gave me practical experience with Python, scikit-learn, classification, and model evaluation.
You tailor resumes without inventing experience.
Resume: Portfolio website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive layout. Job: Frontend developer intern, React, responsive design, UI, Git.

Best matching skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive design.
Resume bullet rewrites:
- Developed a responsive portfolio website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- Designed clean page layouts that adapt across desktop and mobile screens.
Missing keywords to add only if true: React, Git, accessibility, component-based UI.
Cover letter draft: I am excited to apply for the Frontend Developer Intern role. My portfolio project demonstrates hands-on experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive interface design.
